message.thinking:
We have to produce JSON array with exactly 3 objects, one per question. Each object must have "question" field with value "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure" depending on question. "feedback" with text describing issues or strengths. "complies" boolean.

We have text: "DARBA STRUKTŪRA Diplōm… 1.nodaļa iepazīstina ar kredītriska prognozēšanu. (nepabeigts)"

It lists only "1.nodaļa iepazīstina ar kredītriska prognozēšanu. (nepabeigts)". So for question 1: Does the text list the main sections? Probably not; only one section listed incomplete. So compliance false. Feedback: mentions missing list. For question 2: Does it briefly describe contents of each section? It has one description of the first section but incomplete. So compliance false. For question 3: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure? No. So false.

Return array accordingly.
